question: 列出所有来自中国的用户
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE country IN ('China', '中国')

question: 各国家销售额是多少？
gold_sql: N/A - 标准指标 sales_amount + user_country 应通过 semanticQuery，不允许 executeQuery 绕过语义层
criteria: sales_amount/销售额|user_country/country/国家|semanticQuery/SEMANTIC_COVERAGE_REQUIRED/该查询应使用 semanticQuery

question: 列出所有来自中国的用户
gold_sql: SELECT users.id, users.username, users.country FROM users WHERE users.country IN ('China', '中国')

question: 计算上个月的总销售额
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total_price) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= ...

question: 找出购买过 Electronics 类产品次数最多的前 3 名用户
gold_sql: SELECT u.username, COUNT(o.id) FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id ...

question: 我想看下各个国家的客单价 (AOV) 是多少？
gold_sql: SELECT ... FROM orders JOIN users ... GROUP BY ...

question: 销售额最高的前 3 个国家
gold_sql: SELECT ... ORDER BY sales_amount DESC LIMIT 3

question: 最近 7 天销售额
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(orders.total_price) FROM orders WHERE orders.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

category: Phase 1: 多事实表认证查询
question: 上个月各国家销售额和退货金额
gold_sql: WITH fact_0 AS (... orders.order_date ...), fact_1 AS (... returns.return_date ...) SELECT user_country, sales_amount, return_amount ...

question: 对比今年和去年同期的销售额变化
gold_sql: WITH current_period AS (...), historical_period AS (...) SELECT (current - prev) / prev ...

question: 本季度至今 (QTD) 的订单量是多少？
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE)

question: 查看订单明细，要求包含用户名 (username) 和产品类别 (category)
gold_sql: SELECT orders.*, users.username, products.category FROM orders JOIN users ON ... JOIN products ON ...

question: 毛利率是多少？
gold_sql: N/A - 语义层未定义毛利率指标，应澄清或说明语义层未覆盖
criteria: gross_margin/毛利率|语义层未覆盖/未知指标/askClarification/listSemanticAtoms
